visuals.title: System Call Execution Flow
visuals.description: Diagram showing how a system call transitions from user mode through the system call interface to kernel mode and back

diagrams.title: System Call Flow
steps: User program calls API function (e.g., read())
C library sets system call number in register
CPU switches from user mode to kernel mode
Kernel looks up system call number in system call table
CPU switches back to user mode
diagrams.notes: The mode bit changes from 1 (user) to 0 (kernel) during the system call and back to 1 on return.
